g.aria-label: API Response Time , Box Plot with 3 groups and 9 plots. To navigate the chart, use Enter to move into the list of plot groups or use the arrow keys to navigate the chart information.

Europe group, 1 of 3 groups, has 3 box plots. To navigate the list of plot groups, use the arrow keys to move between plot groups in list order, use Enter to move into the list of plots for that plot group, use Shift + Enter to return to the chart information.

Europe Checkout plot, 277.5, box from 265 to 290, whiskers from 250 to 300, 1 outlier, 1 of 3 plots inside Europe group. End of value order.
